name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench.
Grip the barbell slightly wider than shoulder width.
Lower the bar to your chest.
Press the bar back up to the starting position.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Set an incline bench to 30-45 degrees.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Press the dumbbells up until arms are extended.
Lower back to starting position.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Stand between two cable machines.
Grab the handles with arms extended.
Bring hands together in front of your chest.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Bend at the waist with knees slightly bent.
Grip the barbell with an overhand grip.
Pull the bar to your lower chest.
Lower the bar back down.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Sit at a lat pulldown machine.
Grab the bar wider than shoulder width.
Pull the bar down to your upper chest.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Stand with feet hip-width apart.
Bend at hips and knees to grip the bar.
Drive through your heels to stand up.
Lower the bar back to the ground.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the barbell at shoulder height.
Press the bar overhead until arms are locked.
Lower back to shoulder height.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at your sides.
Raise arms out to the sides until parallel to the floor.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Set a cable machine to upper chest height.
Grab the rope attachment with both hands.
Pull towards your face, separating the rope ends.
Squeeze shoulder blades together.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with a barbell using an underhand grip.
Curl the bar up to shoulder level.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Hold dumbbells with a neutral grip.
Curl the weights up keeping palms facing each other.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at a cable machine with a straight bar attachment.
Push the bar down until arms are fully extended.
Slowly return to starting position.

name: Skull Crusher
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding an EZ bar.
Lower the bar towards your forehead.
Extend arms back to starting position.

name: Squat
instructions: Place the barbell on your upper back.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Squat down until thighs are parallel to the floor.
Drive through your heels to stand back up.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Sit on the leg press machine.
Place feet shoulder-width apart on the platform.
Push the platform away by extending your legs.
Lower back down with control.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Hold a barbell at hip level.
Push hips back while lowering the bar along your legs.
Keep a slight bend in your knees.
Return to standing by driving hips forward.

name: Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face down on the leg curl machine.
Curl your legs up towards your glutes.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on the calf raise machine.
Rise up on your toes as high as possible.
Lower back down slowly.

name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent.
Place hands behind your head.
Curl your upper body towards your knees.
Lower back down with control.

name: Plank
instructions: Get into a push-up position on your forearms.
Keep your body in a straight line.
Hold the position for the desired time.
Keep your core tight throughout.
